rationale: Accepted the SQNT-03A dirty target replay. The observed route is emitted through BattleEntrypointTrace.route_events using public reducer start/discover/resolve entrypoints and reducer-owned targeted HitPointRegainPrevention subject construction. Expected route facts are literal from the copied HitPointRegainPreventionRouteSubject connector. Runtime healing is interdicted by typed active-effect phase state, and cleanup is rejected until BattleTurnBoundaryOwner expiry transitions the effect to Expired.
